pr.title: Add Lane-3A Revit read-only validation runbook (Revit 2026 operator target)
pr.description:
## Summary

Operator-approved Lane-3A runbook at `docs/runbooks/lane3a-revit-readonly-validation-runbook.md` — the gate between lane-2 (Windows non-Revit loop, passed 2026-07-02) and lane-3B (real-Revit mutation / PR C).

8-gate read-only validation on the furnace: environment discovery → **Revit 2026** add-in build/deploy (2024 baseline / 2027 Program Files paths mentioned only as background context; no verified 2026 build target exists yet, so the exact MSBuild `RevitVersion`-override commands used become part of the returned evidence — a 2026 build failure is a lane-3A finding, not a reason to silently fall back) → add-in load smoke → read-only InventoryModel (summary + at most one constrained follow-up; full/whole-model modes explicitly forbidden per BUG-017) → artifact capture under `artifacts/model_inventory_runs/` → Local Runner compatibility (allowlist has no Revit-attached action by design) → `emit_evidence_summary` (attested → captured) → commit evidence.

Rules carried per the operator's spec: read-only only (no SetParameterValue, no batch mutation, no save-required operation); explicit rule that **lane-3A success does not imply lane-3B mutation readiness**; unwired artifact/evidence paths are recorded as gaps instead of inventing proof; **close-without-saving** default cleanup. Includes the operator-fields table (Revit 2026 version/build, model name/path, disposable/copied/backed-up confirmation, add-in path, manifest path, expected artifact dirs, cleanup action), per-gate PASS/FAIL criteria, and the evidence-to-return list.

Docs-only (tier 1 — no pytest run). No behavior change, no ledger entry needed; 2024 baseline unaffected. The runbook itself is the live-validation procedure — no Revit validation required for this PR.

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8ad1c9ac0d2f4252bb77647f1eabaac7
Requested by: @plamen-dev
pr.author: plamen-dev
